summary: Hero Section Redesign Testing Complete - ALL 22 FEATURES VERIFIED. New split layout: LEFT 55% (#0D1B2A navy) + RIGHT 45% (#112236 darker navy) on desktop. All content elements verified: eyebrow 'SAN FRANCISCO & BAY AREA' with 36px amber line, H1 'Your Appliances Fixed Right' at 52px Montserrat 800, subtext, trust row, amber Book Repair Online button linking to /book?go=1, transparent Call button with hover to amber, note text. Right side has medallion logo (max-width 400px) with radial amber glow. Mobile elements (city bg, social icons, 'Service Available' text) correctly hidden on desktop via heroMobile display:none. Bottom divider 1px rgba(224,123,57,0.25). Header works correctly over hero with z-index 100. All nav dropdowns functional. Intro section shows H2 after scroll.
critical_code_review_comments: DOM has 2 H1 tags (desktop hero + mobile hero), but mobile H1 parent is correctly hidden on desktop (display:none). From SEO perspective, only 1 H1 is visible per viewport which is acceptable.
Call button border is 1px instead of specified 1.5px - minor CSS discrepancy
All other specs match requirements exactly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Hero redesign complete. Desktop shows 55/45 split layout with navy backgrounds. Mobile (<1024px) shows original fullscreen background layout. CSS uses .heroDesktop (flex on desktop) and .heroMobile (display:none on desktop). All test-ids in place: hero-section, hero-desktop, hero-left, hero-right, hero-eyebrow, hero-h1, hero-subtext, hero-trust-row, hero-cta-row, hero-book-btn, hero-call-btn, hero-note, hero-logo-desktop.
